content.body: 🎉 The import-text changes were just merged into the [HTML Standard](https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#:~:text=If%20moduleType%20is%20%22text%22%2C%20then%20set%20moduleScript%20to%20the%20result%20of%20creating%20a%20text%20module%20script%20given%20sourceText%20and%20settingsObject.).
content.formatted_body: 🎉 The import-text changes were just merged into the HTML Standard.

content.body: That does mean that HTML currently has a normative dependency on the TC39 Stage 3 [import-text proposal](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-import-text), but apparently this is normal and not novel.
content.formatted_body: That does mean that HTML currently has a normative dependency on the TC39 Stage 3 import-text proposal, but apparently this is normal and not novel.

content.body: the ECMA-402 2026 release candidate is out as well: https://tc39.es/ecma402/2026/
